info.title: WikiKit API
info.description: Headless, AI-native knowledge system for humans and agents. Markdown-first knowledge in; structured, cited, review-gated knowledge out. Scopes: knowledge:read | knowledge:propose | knowledge:review | knowledge:approve | admin (approve implies review). MCP (Streamable HTTP) is available at POST /mcp, outside this REST surface; remote MCP clients use OAuth 2.1 discovery, PKCE and explicitly requested scopes.

Human review page for one ChangeProposal — the out-of-band surface for MCP clients without form elicitation. Public content-free shell; the proposal itself loads with the reviewer’s own credential.
Built-in system knowledge and no-CLI MCP client setup for AI agents

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.1 authorization code with PKCE-S256 for interactive clients.

scopes.knowledge:read: Read spaces, sources, concepts, search and reviewed proposals
scopes.knowledge:propose: Create ingest jobs and staged proposals
scopes.knowledge:review: Inspect and start human proposal review
scopes.knowledge:approve: Approve or reject proposals after explicit human review

source_kind.description: What the source is: 'meeting' sources are mined for explicit decision statements

transcript.description: The coding-agent session transcript; over-long input keeps its tail

status.description: no_learnings is the normal outcome — most sessions teach nothing durable

ingest_id.description: Set when status is queued — poll GET /v1/ingests/{id}

learnings.description: How many durable rules were distilled

agent_run_id.description: The distill call in the audit ledger — present even when nothing was learned
